meaning: n.废话,闲聊vi.讲废话vt.胡说八道地讲
examples: This is all hopeless twaddle that I am saying about her.
They won't waste it listening to the interviewees' twaddle.
Much of this is total twaddle, especially for football and banking.
Yet a combination of new technology and deregulation has blown such protectionist twaddle out of the water.
However, Falkirk finished on a high when Twaddle scored from barely a yard out following Latapy's 75th-minute free-kick.
